en: Lie on bench, EZ-bar held over chest, narrow grip.
Hinge at elbows, lower bar toward forehead.
Extend triceps to return — keep elbows fixed.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, EZ 杠胸前举起, 窄握.
肘部铰链, 下放至额头.
三头发力伸直 — 肘部固定.

en: Keep elbows tight — flaring increases shoulder strain.
zh-Hans: 肘部内收 — 外翻容易伤肩.

en: Lie on bench, hold barbell over chest, shoulder-width.
Lower bar to forehead by bending elbows.
Press back up — elbows stay tucked.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 杠铃举胸前, 与肩同宽.
屈肘下放至额头.
推起 — 肘部保持内收.

en: Bar over forehead, not face — use spotter on heavy sets.
zh-Hans: 杠在额头上方, 不要砸脸 — 大重量需保护.

en: Lie on bench, dumbbells over chest, palms facing.
Bend elbows to lower dumbbells beside head.
Extend triceps to press back up.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 哑铃举胸前, 对握.
屈肘下放至头侧.
三头发力推起.

en: Set bench to 30-45° incline.
EZ-bar over chest, lower toward top of head.
Extend back up — extra stretch on long head.
zh-Hans: 卧推凳调至 30-45°.
EZ 杠胸前举起, 下放至头顶.
伸直推起 — 长头额外拉伸.

en: Decline bench, feet locked, EZ-bar over chest.
Lower bar to forehead — constant tension.
Extend triceps to press up.
zh-Hans: 下斜凳, 脚固定, EZ 杠胸前举起.
下放至额头 — 持续张力.
三头发力推起.

en: Have spotter hand bar up — decline angle awkward.
zh-Hans: 让保护递杠 — 下斜起身不便.

name.zh-Hans: 颈后臂屈伸 (过头, EZ-杠)

en: Lie on bench, EZ-bar held over face.
Lower bar past forehead to behind head.
Maximum long-head stretch, extend back up.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, EZ 杠举脸上方.
下放越过额头至脑后.
长头最大拉伸, 伸直推起.

en: Use lighter weight — increased shoulder leverage.
zh-Hans: 重量减轻 — 肩部杠杆增大.

en: Standard skullcrusher setup, EZ-bar.
3-second eccentric, 1-second pause at bottom.
Explosive concentric — strict form.
zh-Hans: 标准颈后臂屈伸姿势, EZ 杠.
3 秒下放, 底部停 1 秒.
爆发推起 — 严格控制.

en: Bench setup, narrow grip — hybrid of bench + skullcrusher.
Lower bar toward upper chest / chin, elbows forward.
Press up explosively — heavy triceps loading.
zh-Hans: 卧推姿势, 窄握 — 卧推与颈后屈伸结合.
下放至上胸 / 下巴, 肘部前推.
爆发推起 — 三头超负荷.

en: Use safety pins — bar path close to neck.
Start light, learn the unique groove.
zh-Hans: 使用安全杠 — 杠路接近颈部.
从轻开始, 掌握独特轨迹.

en: Lie on bench, dumbbells over chest, palms forward.
Bend elbows out, lower dumbbells to touch chest.
Extend triceps to press up — elbows flare out.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 哑铃胸前, 掌心向前.
肘外展, 下放哑铃触胸.
三头发力推起 — 肘部外展.

en: Unusual elbow path — start light to learn.
zh-Hans: 肘部轨迹特殊 — 从轻开始.

en: Bench setup, close grip — hybrid of skullcrusher + close-grip bench.
Lower bar to forehead first, then slide down to chest.
Press up reverse path — strong triceps emphasis.
zh-Hans: 卧推姿势, 窄握 — 颈后屈伸 + 窄距卧推混合.
先下放至额头, 再滑至胸口.
反向推起 — 强烈刺激三头.

en: Use safety pins or spotter.
Master skullcrusher and close-grip bench first.
zh-Hans: 使用安全杠或保护.
先掌握颈后屈伸和窄距卧推.

en: Board (1-3 boards) on chest, narrow grip on barbell.
Lower bar to board, brief pause.
Press up — partial range, heavy triceps lockout.
zh-Hans: 胸上放木板 (1-3 块), 杠铃窄握.
下放至板, 短暂停顿.
推起 — 半程, 三头锁定.

en: Need partner to hold board or use velcro strap. Use spotter.
zh-Hans: 需搭档扶板或绑带固定. 使用保护.

en: Lower EZ-bar to forehead, press halfway up.
Lower back down, then press to full lockout.
Counts as one rep — extra time under tension.
zh-Hans: 下放 EZ 杠至额头, 推至半程.
再次下放, 推至完全锁定.
算一次 — 额外张力时间.

en: Stand facing cable, high pulley, straight bar.
Elbows pinned at sides, push bar down to thighs.
Squeeze triceps at bottom, control return.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 高位定滑轮, 直杆.
肘部固定体侧, 推至大腿前.
底部收紧三头, 控制回程.

en: Face cable, high pulley, rope attachment.
Push rope down, separate hands at bottom.
Squeeze hard — pronate wrists outward.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 高位, 绳索附件.
下推绳索, 底部双手分开.
用力收紧 — 手腕外旋.

en: Face cable, high pulley, V-bar attachment.
Grip V-bar, elbows tucked, push down hard.
Lock out triceps, slow return.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 高位, V-杆附件.
握 V-杆, 肘内收, 用力下推.
三头锁定, 缓慢回程.

en: Attach EZ-bar to high cable pulley.
Grip angled bend, elbows tight.
Push down — wrist neutral, squeeze bottom.
zh-Hans: EZ 杠装高位绳索.
握斜把, 肘部内收.
下推 — 腕中立, 底部收紧.

en: Face cable, single-handle high pulley.
Elbow at side, push handle down to hip.
Squeeze, slow return — full range.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 高位单手柄.
肘部固定, 下推至髋部.
收紧, 缓慢回程 — 全程.

en: Face cable, high pulley, straight bar, underhand grip.
Elbows tucked, push down to thighs.
Emphasize medial head — lighter weight.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 高位直杆, 反握.
肘部内收, 下推至大腿前.
强化内侧头 — 轻重量.

en: Face cable, single handle, underhand grip.
Elbow pinned, push handle down to hip.
Strong medial head contraction at bottom.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 单手柄反握.
肘部固定, 下推至髋部.
底部强烈刺激内侧头.

en: Anchor band overhead, grip with both hands.
Elbows tucked, push down to thighs.
Resistance peaks at lockout.
zh-Hans: 弹力带固定头顶, 双手握紧.
肘部内收, 下推至大腿前.
锁定时阻力最大.

en: Sit at triceps machine, grip handles.
Push handles down to full extension.
Squeeze triceps, slow return.
zh-Hans: 坐三头机, 握住手柄.
下推至完全伸直.
收紧三头, 缓慢回程.

en: Stand sideways to high cable, opposite arm grips handle.
Pull handle across body diagonally downward.
Squeeze triceps, control return.
zh-Hans: 侧对高位绳索, 对侧手握柄.
斜向下跨体伸展.
收紧三头, 控制回程.

en: Face away from cable, grip rope behind head.
Elbows up, extend rope overhead and forward.
Stretch long head — slow return.
zh-Hans: 背对绳索, 脑后握绳索.
肘部上举, 向前向上伸展.
拉伸长头 — 缓慢回程.

name.en: Close-Grip Bench Press (Smith Machine, Triceps Focus)
name.zh-Hans: 窄距卧推 (史密斯机, 三头版)

en: Bench under Smith bar, narrow grip — elbows fully tucked.
Lower to lower chest, brief touch.
Press up — focus on triceps drive in lockout.
zh-Hans: 卧推凳置史密斯杠下, 窄握 — 肘完全内收.
下放至下胸, 轻触.
推起 — 锁定阶段三头发力.

en: Stand or seated, EZ-bar overhead, narrow grip.
Lower bar behind head — elbows fixed, point forward.
Extend back overhead — squeeze triceps.
zh-Hans: 站或坐, EZ 杠过顶, 窄握.
下放脑后 — 肘部固定向前.
推回过顶 — 收紧三头.

en: Keep elbows tight — flaring strains shoulders.
zh-Hans: 肘部内收 — 外翻伤肩.

en: Stand or seated, barbell overhead, shoulder-width.
Lower bar behind head — elbows forward.
Press back overhead, full extension.
zh-Hans: 站或坐, 杠铃过顶, 与肩同宽.
下放脑后 — 肘部向前.
推回过顶, 完全伸直.

en: Use lighter weight — avoid shoulder impingement.
zh-Hans: 使用轻重量 — 避免肩部撞击.

en: Hold one dumbbell with both hands overhead.
Cup top plate, lower behind head with elbows tight.
Press back overhead — squeeze triceps.
zh-Hans: 双手共握一只哑铃过顶.
捧住上端片, 肘内收下放脑后.
推回过顶 — 收紧三头.

name.zh-Hans: 过顶伸展 (哑铃, 单臂)

en: Stand, dumbbell in one hand overhead.
Lower dumbbell behind head — elbow vertical.
Press back up — free hand can stabilize elbow.
zh-Hans: 站立, 单手哑铃过顶.
下放脑后 — 肘部垂直.
推回过顶 — 另一手稳定肘部.

en: Sit on bench with back support, dumbbell overhead.
Lower behind head, hold contraction at stretch.
Extend back up, squeeze triceps.
zh-Hans: 坐有靠背凳上, 哑铃过顶.
下放脑后, 拉伸处停顿.
推回过顶, 收紧三头.

en: Face away from low cable, rope behind head.
Lean slightly forward, elbows up beside ears.
Extend rope forward and up — separate at top.
zh-Hans: 背对低位绳索, 绳索置脑后.
略前倾, 肘部上举贴耳.
向前向上伸展 — 顶部分开.

en: Face away from cable, low pulley, V-bar attachment.
Grip V-bar overhead, elbows beside ears.
Extend bar forward and up — full triceps stretch.
zh-Hans: 背对绳索机, 低位 V-杆.
V-杆过顶, 肘部贴耳.
向前向上伸展 — 三头充分拉伸.

name.zh-Hans: 过顶伸展 (绳索, 单臂)

en: Face away from low cable, single handle in one hand.
Elbow up beside ear, extend handle overhead.
Squeeze long head, slow return.
zh-Hans: 背对低位绳索, 单手柄.
肘部贴耳上举, 过顶伸展.
收紧长头, 缓慢回程.

en: Lie on bench, EZ-bar held over chest at angle toward head.
Lower bar past head — arms angled back.
Extend up at the same angle — strong long-head stretch.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, EZ 杠斜向头侧举起.
下放越过头部 — 双臂后倾.
同角度推起 — 长头强烈拉伸.

en: Use spotter — bar path near head.
zh-Hans: 使用保护 — 杠路接近头部.

en: Sit upright on bench, barbell overhead, narrow grip.
Lower bar behind head with elbows pointing forward.
Extend back up — focus on long head.
zh-Hans: 坐凳直立, 杠铃过顶窄握.
下放脑后, 肘部指向前.
推回上方 — 重点长头.

en: Don't let bar drop on neck — control on descent.
zh-Hans: 不要让杠砸颈部 — 控制下放.

en: Hold kettlebell with both hands, bell behind head.
Lower kettlebell behind head — elbows in.
Extend overhead, squeeze triceps.
zh-Hans: 双手共握壶铃, 球部置脑后.
下放脑后 — 肘部内收.
过顶推起, 收紧三头.

en: Anchor band low, grip handle overhead behind head.
Extend handle overhead — elbow stays in place.
Slow return to stretch.
zh-Hans: 弹力带固定低位, 脑后握手柄.
过顶伸展 — 肘部固定.
缓慢回程至拉伸.

name.zh-Hans: 三头后摆 (哑铃, 单臂)

en: Knee and hand on bench, opposite foot planted.
Upper arm parallel to floor, dumbbell at 90°.
Extend arm back — squeeze triceps, slow return.
zh-Hans: 单膝单手撑凳, 对侧脚着地.
大臂与地面平行, 哑铃 90°.
向后伸直 — 收紧三头, 缓慢回程.

en: Stand hinged at hips, dumbbells in both hands.
Upper arms parallel to torso, elbows at 90°.
Extend both arms back — squeeze, slow return.
zh-Hans: 站立髋部前倾, 双手持哑铃.
大臂贴体侧, 肘部 90°.
双臂向后伸直 — 收紧, 缓慢回程.

en: Both knees on bench, one hand supports, dumbbell in other.
Hinge forward, upper arm parallel to torso.
Extend back — fully lock arm at top.
zh-Hans: 双膝跪凳, 一手撑, 另一手持哑铃.
前倾, 大臂贴体侧.
向后伸直 — 顶部完全锁定.

name.zh-Hans: 三头后摆 (绳索, 单臂)

en: Face cable, low pulley, single handle.
Hinge forward, upper arm parallel to torso.
Extend handle back — constant tension.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 低位单手柄.
前倾, 大臂贴体侧.
向后伸展 — 持续张力.

en: Face cable, low rope attachment, hinge forward.
Upper arms parallel to torso, elbows at 90°.
Extend rope back, spread hands at end.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 低位绳索, 前倾.
大臂贴体侧, 肘部 90°.
向后伸展, 末端双手分开.

en: Anchor band low and forward, grip ends, hinge forward.
Upper arms tight at sides, extend elbows back.
Resistance peaks at lockout.
zh-Hans: 弹力带前下方固定, 握两端, 前倾.
大臂贴体侧, 后伸肘部.
锁定处阻力最大.

en: Plank position, hands shoulder-width, elbows tucked.
Lower with elbows tracking along ribs.
Press up — strong triceps lockout.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 双手与肩同宽, 肘内收.
下放时肘沿肋骨方向.
推起 — 三头锁定发力.

en: Sit on bench edge, hands beside hips, feet on floor.
Slide off bench, lower body by bending elbows.
Press back up — keep hips close to bench.
zh-Hans: 坐凳边, 双手撑髋两侧, 脚着地.
离开凳子, 屈肘下降身体.
推起 — 髋部贴近凳子.

en: Don't go too low — protects shoulders.
zh-Hans: 不要下放过低 — 保护肩部.

en: Bench dip setup, weight plate on lap.
Lower until arms at 90°, control descent.
Press up — keep plate balanced.
zh-Hans: 椅上臂屈伸姿势, 大腿上放杠片.
下降至大臂 90°, 控制下放.
推起 — 保持杠片平衡.

en: Don't shrug shoulders — keep them down and back.
zh-Hans: 不要耸肩 — 双肩下沉后展.

en: Hands on one bench, feet on second bench.
Lower body, elbows bend to 90°.
Press back up — increased difficulty vs floor.
zh-Hans: 双手撑一凳, 双脚搭另一凳.
下降身体, 肘部 90°.
推起 — 比脚着地更难.

en: Watch shoulder strain — limit depth if uncomfortable.
zh-Hans: 注意肩部压力 — 不适时减少深度.

en: Grip parallel bars, body upright — no forward lean.
Lower with elbows tracking back behind body.
Press up to lockout — emphasize triceps.
zh-Hans: 握双杠, 身体直立 — 不要前倾.
下降时肘部向后.
推至锁定 — 强化三头.

en: Don't go below 90° elbow bend — shoulder strain.
Build up slowly — high difficulty.
zh-Hans: 肘部不要低于 90° — 伤肩.
缓慢进阶 — 难度高.

name.zh-Hans: 双杠臂屈伸 (三头版, 负重)

en: Attach weight via belt, grip parallel bars upright.
Lower with control, elbows track back.
Press up — strict form essential.
zh-Hans: 腰带挂杠片, 握双杠直立.
控制下降, 肘部向后.
推起 — 严格动作至关重要.

en: Use a dip belt, not held weight — frees up grip.
Spotter useful for adding/removing weight.
zh-Hans: 使用腰带, 不要手持杠片 — 不占握力.
上下杠片有人帮忙更安全.

en: Mount above single bar, palms facing forward, arms locked.
Lower body — feet stay forward for balance.
Press back up to support hold.
zh-Hans: 撑单杠上方, 掌心向前, 手臂锁定.
下放身体 — 双脚前伸保持平衡.
推回支撑位.

en: Significant balance and strength demand — master double-bar dip first.
Practice on shorter bars for safety.
zh-Hans: 对平衡和力量要求高 — 先掌握双杠.
在低杠练习更安全.

en: Mount rings, body upright, rings just outside hips.
Lower with elbows tracking back, body vertical.
Press up — rings turn out at top (RTO optional).
zh-Hans: 上吊环, 身体直立, 环在髋两侧外.
下降时肘后, 躯干垂直.
推起 — 顶部可外旋环 (RTO 可选).

en: Master parallel bar dips first — rings demand stability.
Don't drop into bottom — controlled descent.
zh-Hans: 先掌握双杠 — 吊环对稳定性要求高.
不要下坠到底 — 控制下放.

en: Hold single bar in front, palms forward, lean back.
Body angles back, lower with elbows tucked.
Press to lock — extreme triceps loading.
zh-Hans: 握身前单杠, 掌心向前, 后倾.
身体后倾, 下降肘内收.
推起锁定 — 三头超负荷.

en: High shoulder demand — master regular dips first.
Start with assist band or limited range.
zh-Hans: 肩部要求高 — 先掌握普通臂屈伸.
从弹力带辅助或半程开始.

en: Place two dumbbells together, grip them in push-up position.
Press dumbbells together — chest and triceps engaged.
Push up while maintaining crush pressure.
zh-Hans: 两哑铃并紧, 俯卧撑姿势握紧.
夹紧哑铃 — 胸和三头收紧.
保持夹挤推起.

en: Adjust seat, grip handles, elbows on pad.
Press handles down to full extension.
Squeeze, slow return — full stretch at top.
zh-Hans: 调整座椅, 握手柄, 肘部置垫.
下推至完全伸直.
收紧, 缓慢回程 — 顶部充分拉伸.

en: Adjust machine, one arm at a time.
Press handle to full extension.
Slow return, full stretch — work side independently.
zh-Hans: 调整器械, 单臂操作.
推至完全伸直.
缓慢回程, 充分拉伸 — 单侧独立训练.

en: Stand holding medicine ball overhead with both hands.
Lower ball behind head — elbows in.
Extend ball overhead, squeeze triceps.
zh-Hans: 站立, 双手共握药球过顶.
下放脑后 — 肘部内收.
过顶伸展, 收紧三头.

en: Lie on bench, dumbbells over chest.
Lower to forehead (skullcrusher), then roll back behind head.
Press from behind head — combined motion.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 哑铃举胸前.
下放至额头, 然后滚至脑后.
从脑后推起 — 复合动作.

en: Standard skullcrusher setup, EZ-bar.
Lower to forehead, pause 2 seconds — full triceps stretch.
Extend back up under control.
zh-Hans: 标准颈后臂屈伸姿势, EZ 杠.
下放至额头, 停 2 秒 — 三头充分拉伸.
控制推起.

en: Hands on plates or blocks, close grip, plank position.
Lower chest below hand level — increased range.
Press up, elbows tucked tight to body.
zh-Hans: 手撑杠片或砖块, 窄握, 平板支撑.
胸部下放至低于手位 — 加大幅度.
推起, 肘部紧贴身体.

en: Start in plank, lower to forearms.
Press back up to plank using triceps.
Forearms touch floor each rep — pure triceps.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 下放至前臂.
三头发力推回平板支撑.
每次前臂触地 — 纯三头发力.

name.zh-Hans: 坐姿三头伸展 (哑铃, 对握)

en: Sit with back support, dumbbells overhead, palms facing.
Lower behind head with elbows in.
Press up — neutral grip protects elbows.
zh-Hans: 坐有靠背凳, 哑铃过顶对握.
下放脑后, 肘部内收.
推起 — 对握保护肘关节.

en: Kneel on all fours, dumbbell in one hand.
Upper arm parallel to torso, extend elbow back.
Squeeze triceps at lockout, slow return.
zh-Hans: 四足跪地, 单手持哑铃.
大臂贴体侧, 后伸肘部.
锁定时收紧三头, 缓慢回程.

en: Face cable, high pulley, straight bar.
Pull elbows behind body as bar comes down.
Lock arms at sides — increased ROM.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 高位直杆.
下推时肘部后移过躯干.
锁定体侧 — 加大幅度.
